seoTitle: How to Set Out of Office in New Outlook
metaDescription: Learn how to set Out of Office automatic replies in New Outlook, schedule exact dates, and write separate messages for internal and external contacts.
intro: Stepping away from your inbox shouldn't leave client inquiries hanging with no response. New Outlook's automatic replies let you schedule exact start and end dates and write different messages for internal teammates versus external clients. This guide walks through the full setup.

steps.heading: Open Settings
steps.body: In your New Outlook app or web interface, click the gear-shaped Settings icon next to your profile picture.

steps.heading: Go to Automatic Replies
steps.body: In the settings panel, select the Accounts category, then click into the Automatic Replies dashboard.

steps.heading: Turn the feature on
steps.body: Toggle the primary slider marked Turn on automatic replies to the enabled state.

steps.heading: Schedule your dates
steps.body: Check the option to send replies only during a time period, then set your target start and end dates.

steps.heading: Write your message
steps.body: Type your professional away message into the main message field, and optionally check the box to send a separate copy to external contacts.

steps.heading: Save your settings
steps.body: Click the Save button to lock in your automatic reply configuration.

faq.question: Can I write a different message for external clients?
faq.answer: Yes, checking the option to send replies outside your organization lets you provide a separate message for external contacts.

faq.question: Will automatic replies turn off on their own?
faq.answer: Yes, if you set a scheduled time period, replies stop automatically once the end date passes.

faq.question: Does this decline meeting invites automatically?
faq.answer: The New Outlook automatic replies setup includes options to handle incoming meeting invitations while you're away.

faq.question: Can I manage automatic replies for multiple accounts?
faq.answer: Yes, you can configure automatic reply rules separately for each connected email address.
